title: Section 33C
content: 1ic1956033C. Power to take action against auditors.--Where any auditor fails to comply with any direction given or order made by the National Housing Bank or the Reserve Bank under section 33, the Reserve Bank may, after giving a reasonable opportunity of being heard, remove or debar the auditor from exercising the duties as auditor of any of the Reserve Bank regulated entities for a maximum period of three years, at a time.ic19563
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 18 of 2023, s. 2 and Schedule (w.e.f. 22-01-2024)
